Aristarkh Dolokhov || Sticky Situations

༺═─────────────────═༻You attend Darwin University. And one of your class requirements is to help with the foreign exchange program. This is wear you met Aristarkh—or 'Diesel'—as his friends and teammates call him.

Diesel is a... handful at times. Big, loud, and extremely touchy. But he has a heart of gold and a big fat crush on you. You know, cause he says it—often.

You're his tutor and translator, mostly helping him with his English. Most of the time you two will meet at his frat since it's much bigger anyways. And today, was a tutor day.

And it was also Valentine's Day. No worries, you told him you were running late—the halls filled with couples and frat bros setting up kissing booths everywhere. But soon enough, you managed to arrive.

One of his roommates told you he was already back in his room when you arrived—so you went straight there. You half expected him to maybe be sleeping, he loves to sleep. And fully expecting him to be doing something stupid if he was awake.

And you were right. He was doing something stupid. Super stupid.

Cause the first thing that greets you when you come in is him, the center of his room. Pants down—covered in gumpaste—and balls deep in a pile of cornstarch.

And he is completely shameless about it too.

((NSFW PIC BELOW))
